title: How To Build a Website With 24/7 AI Sales Agent in 45 Seconds
summary: A YouTube tutorial demonstrates building lead-generation websites with 24/7 AI sales agents using Readdy, a white-label platform. The creator shows real examples with a car dealership and luxury real estate business, where AI agents qualify leads and book appointments automatically without coding.
writeup: This AI Master tutorial walks through building lead-generation websites with embedded 24/7 AI sales agents using Readdy, a white-label, no-code platform. It demonstrates concrete builds for a car dealership and a luxury real estate business, where the AI agents qualify leads and book appointments automatically. The takeaways center on combining chatbot-driven lead enrichment with appointment scheduling, all without writing code and under a white-label setup.
